steps.title: Contrast both locations
steps.content: The goal is not just to mention a specimen; it is to contrast where the two specimens are housed. The notes put Mason in Boston and Elliot in Tokyo.

steps.title: Keep both specimens in view
steps.content: A emphasizes a similarity, C gives only Elliot's location, and D does not identify either location. The sentence naming Boston for Mason and Tokyo for Elliot uses "while" to contrast their locations. The answer is B.
